activity.title: Strategic Review: Submission Backlog Is the Only Remaining Blocker
activity.description: 44-run retrospective: 4 Tier 1 findings confirmed, 60% attack chain success rate, apply mode 100% operational since structural fix. Acceptance rate frozen at 30% — no new submissions in 3 weeks. Submission backlog identified as the sole remaining execution gap.

activity.title: Fintech Platform: P1 Evidence Strengthened — 13 Additional Hypotheses Tested
activity.description: Third authenticated test session on fintech platform OAuth surface. 13 further attack hypotheses tested — redirect_uri bypass and header-based information leak confirmed as additional evidence vectors for the P1 critical finding. Zero new separate findings. Submission-ready evidence package complete.

activity.title: Triage Check: Recurring API Token Expiry Issue Documented
activity.description: Attempted triage status check on Fortune 500 VDP reports revealed both HackerOne and Intigriti API tokens had expired — third occurrence in three months. Documented as a recurring operational gap and published as a methodology lesson.

activity.title: Fintech Platform: P1 Critical Finding — All 5 Gates Passed
activity.description: Deep-dive authenticated session on OAuth custom application surface. Full attack chain validated with Tier 1 end-to-end evidence: backend confirmation achieved. First P1/Critical finding in this engagement — all 5 validation gates passed, submission-ready.

activity.title: Fintech Platform: First Authenticated Test Session Complete
activity.description: Registered test accounts and ran first authenticated assessment session — 10 attack hypotheses tested across IDOR, API object references, and OAuth surfaces. Access controls held across all IDOR vectors; OAuth custom application redirect surface confirmed for follow-up investigation.

activity.title: Automation Structural Fix: Apply Task Types Added
activity.description: Fixed 5-week execution gap in the automation pipeline: created apply and validate task types, added recon-complete guard, updated task-selector priority logic. First authenticated testing sessions now unblocked.

activity.title: Program Discovery: High-Value Target Identified, Shelved
activity.description: Evaluated 8 programs across platforms for skill match, bounty potential, and execution fit. Strong candidate identified but shelved — submission backlog of validated, ready reports must clear before opening a new engagement.

activity.title: Strategic Review: Execution Deadline Set
activity.description: Third consecutive strategic review confirming unchanged priority list — submission backlog, task-type automation gap, and authenticated testing blockage. Deadline set: if apply/validate task types not created by 2026-03-15, automated reviews suspended to stop planning without execution.

activity.title: Strategic Review: Authenticated Testing Transition
activity.description: Completed 3.5-week retrospective identifying zero authenticated testing as the root cause of stalled progress. Defined prioritized session plan: Deriv WebSocket IDOR, Just-Eat Keycloak submission, and automated pipeline repair.

activity.title: E-Commerce Store: Security Assessment Complete
activity.description: Owner-authorized assessment of a Shopify-based e-commerce store. 6 findings across email security, HTTPS configuration, and content policy — actionable remediation roadmap delivered.

activity.title: Fintech Trading Platform: Recon Refresh, New Surfaces Mapped
activity.description: Recon refresh on focus engagement uncovered three new attack surfaces: an unguarded staging environment, an OAuth OIDC configuration with implicit flow and weak PKCE, and a legacy API with exposed documentation and sitemap — expanding the authenticated testing target list.

activity.title: Fortune 500 VDP: Triage Status Verified
activity.description: Restored platform API access after token expiry. Confirmed two reports remain in active triage. Discovered one validated draft report was written but never submitted to platform — closing intake process gap.

activity.title: Food Delivery Platform: Attack Surface Expansion
activity.description: Continuous recon refresh on a global food delivery platform revealed new identity provider surfaces, partner portal configuration exposures, and additional regional payment API endpoints — expanding the tested attack surface beyond the initial enumeration.

activity.title: Strategic Review: Apply Phase Transition
activity.description: Completed 2.5-week retrospective identifying zero authenticated testing as root cause of $0 earned. Shifted automation learning cycle to apply phase — focus engagement set, priority attack surface mapped for authenticated IDOR testing.

activity.title: IDOR Methodology Deep-Dive
activity.description: Deep-dive study session on IDOR detection and exploitation: session misbinding patterns, indirect reference maps, API-level object reference enumeration, and chaining primitives into access control bypasses.

activity.title: Lightweight Web Research Sprint
activity.description: Completed web vulnerability research sprint on exploitation chaining and IDOR attack patterns following auto-bounty system circuit-breaker recovery.

activity.title: Software Startup Consulting Audit
activity.description: Completed owner-authorized security audit for a software startup: 10 findings across authentication, configuration, and data exposure categories. Full audit report delivered.

activity.title: Methodology Deep-Dive Published
activity.description: Published detailed blog post on the 5-gate validation framework, evidence tiers, and chain-first thinking. Portfolio security audit completed — all sensitive program details anonymized.

activity.title: Auto-Bounty System Launched
activity.description: Deployed automated security research orchestrator — cron-driven task selection, Claude sessions, portfolio updates, circuit breakers. Runs 2x daily.

activity.title: Fortune 500 VDP: 2 Reports Submitted
activity.description: CRITICAL: Live database credentials via code repository exposure. HIGH: Unauthenticated session CRUD on internal API. Both submitted to bug bounty platform.
